items.title: OpenCV 5 modernizes vision pipelines
items.oneliner: Major computer vision upgrade with better ONNX support, DNN acceleration, and 3D tooling for Python and edge deployments.

items.title: Apple ships Core AI framework docs
items.oneliner: Official framework docs for building on-device Apple AI apps with structured APIs for vision, language, and model integration.

items.title: Performative UI ships startup design tropes
items.oneliner: MIT React component library with 27 polished landing page patterns for AI products, waitlists, pricing, and social proof.

items.title: Argus Red scans code offensively
items.oneliner: CLI security scanner and authorized pen test tool that finds code vulnerabilities and outputs markdown reports with fixes.

items.title: Gravity simulates Newton through Einstein
items.oneliner: Interactive browser simulator lets you explore orbital mechanics and compare classical and relativistic gravity behavior visually.

items.title: ThinkPad X61 coreboot port walkthrough
items.oneliner: Detailed firmware porting writeup shows how to reverse engineer and bring coreboot to unsupported ThinkPad hardware.

items.title: Postgres 19 query hints explained
items.oneliner: Practical deep dive into pg_plan_advice and pg_stash_advice for engineers evaluating upcoming PostgreSQL query hint support.

items.title: Thi.ng offers modular creative coding blocks
items.oneliner: Open-source toolkit of reusable components for generative graphics, computational design, and rapid prototyping across JavaScript projects.

items.title: CSS centering generator covers every case
items.oneliner: Hands-on CSS reference with 100 centering techniques you can copy for flexbox, grid, transforms, and legacy layouts.

items.title: Parallel dsymutil linker performance notes
items.oneliner: Engineering writeup explains how parallel DWARF linking speeds Apple debug symbol generation without changing debugger expectations.
